📜 V2.5.0 版本前瞻·下┊Version Outlook - Part  Ⅲ

content:
首先我是这个游戏开服5天后的全勤玩家，我经历了砍福袋，米粒逆天剧情，加超限，+12命轮，半周年，各种角色/命轮加强，深潜全部改版，拿过很多榜一，，pvp全部改版也拿过几次榜一，容灾全部改版也拿过很多满分，2个月1个角色，打复活赛，星辰篇各种逆天改动，角色的明砍暗砍。各种弱的角色配上内部恨弱的没边的加强，各种强势角色配上内部爱的逆天加强。之前深潜每天都有动力去抢榜一，现在开一把都是恶心到我。之前pvp一个版本改动好几次，我总有上号开几把的动力，现在一个版本42天改动一次，各种不平衡玩下来让我觉得恶心。我经历过自己玩的pvp角色逆天连砍好几次打算卖号跑路，然后被轮选模式留下来，现在这个轮选跟预组一样垃圾，先后手差距大的要死，经常先后手决定输赢。之前21天一个角色，现在42天一个角色。之前没钱没赢复活赛没产能，现在有钱有产能打赢复活赛了，怎么比之前一个角色出来还要更多时间了？你产能是变成钱去请大牌cv开广播剧了吗？还是一直开发日服全孝敬洋大人去了？pvp产能呢？改几个数据的事都不做了？你全权接管pvp后，我只从pvp感觉到恶心，哪来的快乐？最终法则一堆凑数的，一堆不配觉醒的加上凑数的，一堆内部恨垃圾加强，一堆内部爱逆天加强。你就只出那些卖腐的男的和一堆没啥衣服的女的加上你那h繁衍狂热恶心人。
我之前支持认同过砍福袋，维护理解建议过超限/命轮，反对过各种逆天改动。但是我现在只有恶心，也只想人身攻击你还有你那逆天改动策划

thread_title: 📜 V2.5.0 版本前瞻·下┊Version Outlook - Part  Ⅲ

content:
First of all, I’m a player who’s been playing every day since the game launched five days in. I’ve been through the nerf of the lucky bags, Mi Li’s awful storyline, the addition of Overlimit and +12 Fate Wheels, the half-anniversary, various character/Fate Wheel buffs, all the Deep Dive revamps—I’ve gotten many #1 ranks there. I’ve also seen all the PvP revamps and gotten #1 several times, and all the Disaster Tolerance revamps where I got full scores many times. Then it became one new character every two months, plus the revival bracket nonsense, the terrible changes in the Astral Chapter, and both obvious and hidden nerfs to characters. Weak characters get laughably weak buffs that feel like internal hate, while strong characters get ridiculously OP buffs that feel like internal favoritism.

I used to have the motivation to fight for #1 in Deep Dive every day, but now just opening a match disgusts me. I used to have the urge to hop into PvP every time a patch dropped—sometimes multiple times a patch—but now each version lasts 42 days with barely any changes, and the imbalance just makes me sick. I’ve been through my own PvP main getting brutally nerfed multiple times to the point I wanted to sell my account, but the pick-ban mode kept me around. Now even that mode is as trash as the premade decks, with turn order deciding way too many matches.

It used to be one new character every 21 days, now it’s every 42 days. Back then you had no money and lost the revival bracket so no dev capacity, but now you have money and dev capacity and even won the revival bracket—so why does it take even longer than before to release a single character? Did your dev capacity turn into money for big-name voice actors and radio dramas? Or have you been focusing on the JP server, kowtowing to foreign players? Where’s the PvP content? It’s just tweaking a few numbers, and you can’t even do that? Ever since you fully took over PvP, all I’ve felt is disgust—where’s the fun?
